# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the build artifact')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVER', defaultValue: '', description: 'Production server address')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/path/to/deploy', description: 'Path on production server to deploy the artifact')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/').last()
                    sh "curl -O ${ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "Artifact downloaded: ${artifactName}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sshagent(['your-ssh-key-id']) {
                        sh """
                            scp ${artifactName} user@${PRODUCTION_SERVER}:${DEPLOY_PATH}
                            ssh user@${PRODUCTION_SERVER} "cd ${DEPLOY_PATH}; ./deploy.sh"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
